originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&x` is never used.

reasoning: Known bug for 30e053248da.c is uninitialized read of *length (PRODUCT_27: TRUE, core.uninitialized.Assign). This alarm detects DEAD_STORE: int x = *length at L31 — x is assigned but never subsequently read. New bug (same as PRODUCT_24: TRUE_NEW). x is dead in ALL configs regardless of CONFIG_SECURITY. The PC {SECURITY=F} is unnecessarily narrow. Over-constrained.
